name: wxcode/admin-harbor-banking
title: Harbor Banking Admin
description: Digital banking / personal finance operations console — light mode, navy-blue accent, teal secondary. Left account sidebar, topbar with search and notifications, hero payment-card SVG, 3 KPI tiles, spending donut chart, recent transactions table, and quick-transfer payees panel.

query.en: Build me a digital banking admin console — accounts sidebar, topbar, a stylized payment card, 3 KPI tiles (balance / income / spending), a spending-by-category chart, recent transactions table, and a quick-transfer payees panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a digital banking admin console — accounts sidebar, topbar, a stylized payment card, 3 KPI tiles (balance / income / spending), a spending-by-category chart, recent transactions table, and a quick-transfer payees panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
